name: latency-breakdown
description: Analyze request latency patterns from application logs
query:
fields @timestamp, @message
| filter kubernetes.namespace_name = '${namespace}'
| filter @message like /response_time|latency|duration/
| parse @message /(?<latency_ms>\d+)\s*ms/
| stats avg(latency_ms) as avg_latency, pct(latency_ms, ${percentile}) as p${percentile}_latency, max(latency_ms) as max_latency, count(*) as request_count by bin(5m)
| sort @timestamp desc
